answers: Competitive Programming (CP) = solving algorithmic problems under time constraints. Codeforces, LeetCode, CodeChef are top platforms.
Start CP: learn a language (C++ preferred for speed), learn basic data structures and algorithms, then practice daily.
Key topics: arrays, sorting, binary search, greedy, dynamic programming, graphs, trees, and number theory.
CP tips: solve easy problems first, upsolve (solve problems you couldn't during contest), and learn from editorials.
